item.title: The $30,000,000 SCAM That Led To His Demise
item.description: When Steven Riley Jr. told his girlfriend Ina Kenoyer about a $30 million inheritance, it should have been life-changing news. Instead, it became the beginning of a deadly plan...

media:content.media:title: The $30,000,000 SCAM That Led To His Demise
media:content.media:description: When Steven Riley Jr. told his girlfriend Ina Kenoyer about a $30 million inheritance, it should have been life-changing news. Instead, it became the beginning of a deadly plan...

item.title: Bodycam Footage Reveals Man with 6 Minors in His Car!
item.description: Bodycam Footage Reveals Man with 6 Minors in His Car! ��

media:content.media:title: Bodycam Footage Reveals Man with 6 Minors in His Car!
media:content.media:description: Bodycam Footage Reveals Man with 6 Minors in His Car! ��

item.title: The Dark Side of Social Media Fame: Ali Abulaban #shorts
item.description: What really stands out in this case is how the polished world of online influence can mask deeply rooted issues behind the scenes. Ali built a persona that looked confident, charismatic, even humorous — yet beneath that veneer was someone struggling with control, insecurity, and escalating paranoia. When you think about this case, what hits you hardest — the contrast between his online persona and his real behaviour, the escalation of jealousy, or the tragic impact on the victims who never saw this coming?

media:content.media:title: The Dark Side of Social Media Fame: Ali Abulaban #shorts
media:content.media:description: What really stands out in this case is how the polished world of online influence can mask deeply rooted issues behind the scenes. Ali built a persona that looked confident, charismatic, even humorous — yet beneath that veneer was someone struggling with control, insecurity, and escalating paranoia. When you think about this case, what hits you hardest — the contrast between his online persona and his real behaviour, the escalation of jealousy, or the tragic impact on the victims who never saw this coming?

item.title: The Evil Hidden in Her Own Family - Tia Rigg
item.description: Tia Rigg was a beautiful little girl from Cheetham Hill in Manchester. Even though she had a slightly turbulent family life no one expected her uncle John Maden to turn into a monster and destroy the lives of many. Join me in my latest True Crime episode where I break down this case and how it unfolded in April 2010. Em x

media:content.media:title: The Evil Hidden in Her Own Family - Tia Rigg
media:content.media:description: Tia Rigg was a beautiful little girl from Cheetham Hill in Manchester. Even though she had a slightly turbulent family life no one expected her uncle John Maden to turn into a monster and destroy the lives of many. Join me in my latest True Crime episode where I break down this case and how it unfolded in April 2010. Em x

item.title: Daisy Coleman: How People & Life Failed Her
item.description: Daisy Coleman was a teenage assault survivor whose case exposed victim-blaming, cyberbullying, and deep failures in justice. Her pain became a powerful call for change and support for survivors everywhere. How can we create a world where victims are truly heard and protected?

media:content.media:title: Daisy Coleman: How People & Life Failed Her
media:content.media:description: Daisy Coleman was a teenage assault survivor whose case exposed victim-blaming, cyberbullying, and deep failures in justice. Her pain became a powerful call for change and support for survivors everywhere. How can we create a world where victims are truly heard and protected?

item.title: An Unknown Number Terrorised Them for MONTHS
item.description: How would you react if you realised that the person who has been torturing you was your mum the whole time?

media:content.media:title: An Unknown Number Terrorised Them for MONTHS
media:content.media:description: How would you react if you realised that the person who has been torturing you was your mum the whole time?
